content.en:
With the help of the affinity of the Dao, Ye Tian continued to comprehend the statue of Ten Thousand Phases, and made rapid progress in the mastery of the changes of the Dao.

In a short period of time, he mastered one change after another.

It only took tens of thousands of realm river years for Ye Tian to successfully master hundreds of millions of changes in the Dao of Time.

Then, Ye Tian continued to comprehend the changes of other Daos, and was not in a hurry to create a top-notch Origin Control Technique.

Before you know it, another million years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already mastered hundreds of millions of changing ways of fire, defense, thunder, and so on.

If it was before he devoured the Ten Thousand Phases Lin Dragon, Ye Tian wanted to master so many hundreds of millions of changing Daos, and the time it took was enough to be an astronomical amount, but now it only took a few million realm river years.

"It's time to create a top-notch Origin Mastery!"

Ye Tian decided.

So, he decided to perfect the Origin Control Techniques he had created before to the level of the top Origin Control Techniques, and it was not difficult for him to do this.

In this way, the years passed, and soon Yan Explosion was perfected by Ye Tian to the level of the top origin control technique.

Subsequently, the Heavenly Imperial Body, the Thunder Body Nine Flashes, and the Space-Time Rift Blade and other Origin Control Techniques all became top-notch Origin Control Techniques.

When these top-level origin controllers were created, Ye Tian's own strength naturally increased greatly, breaking the boundaries and stepping into the level of the Eight Realm-level controllers.

"Finally broke through, reached the level of the Eight Realms level masters, plus the two Ten Thousand Phases statues, my current strength is among the top among the Eight Realms level controllers. Ye Tian thought to himself.

If the Quanshan controller is still alive, he and the Quanshan controller will not necessarily be weaker than the downside.

Moreover, he still has primordial golden light, and his ability to save his life is very strong.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to refine his body of control, create top-notch origin control techniques, and perceive the many changes in a doorway, so he slowly accumulated strength in this way.

Although the progress is slow, the strength is still improving little by little, and it will gradually progress to the extreme of the Eight Realms-level controllers, and even step into the level of the Nine Realms-level controllers.

If he could comprehend the Transformation Realm of Will, his strength would definitely be able to easily step into the Nine Realms level controller.

At that time, he will be at the same level of combat power as the senior brother and the fourth senior sister.

However, it is very difficult for the will to reach the realm of incarnation.

He has consulted Shizun and several senior brothers and sisters more than once, and everyone has a different way of breaking through.

For example, Senior Brother Ancient Demon, his will to reach the realm of transformation was by a battle, a battle that was close to death, and he comprehended the realm of transformation at the moment of death, so as to kill the opponent.

And the senior brother Jiang You is simple, he practiced silently, and one day he suddenly reached the realm of transformation.

And the fourth senior sister, Xue Nu, accidentally swallowed a certain mysterious fruit, causing a transformation of her will, thus reaching the realm of transformation.

Everyone's breakthrough method is different, and the Transformation Realm is still essentially the peak of the ninth order, just a special state that has been extended, and there is no complete cultivation system yet.

Even the Ten Elements Ancestors were still groping, so they couldn't give a definite hint on the path of cultivation, so they could only rely on themselves.

"Senior Brother Gu Mo is relying on combat to break through, and there are too many uncertain factors for this to simulate. Senior Brother is relying on silent penance, it is said that the years of senior brother's cultivation are very long, second only to Shizun, and it is not suitable for me to break through with infinite long years. As for the fourth senior sister Snow Girl, it was lucky. It's the third senior brother who is black, and the breakthrough method seems to be a trick, although he didn't say it, but it is definitely not suitable for me. "

"Shizun also said that if I want to break through in my will, he can't help me, I must rely on myself and find a path suitable for my breakthrough!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

And which path is right for you?

Ye Tian pondered for a long time, feeling as if he had to rely on copying talent.

The Realm of Will Transformation still belongs to the Ninth Order Peak Realm, if he copies the body of an Eight-Realm level master, and the other party happens to condense the Willification Realm.

In this way, wouldn't he be able to comprehend the volitional transformation realm with the help of the other party's body?

After realizing it again and again, he may be able to gain insight into the mystery of the volitional form, so that his ontology can step into the volitional form.

"It seems to work!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he began to inquire which Eight Realm-level masters had mastered the Realm of Will Transformation, and although this information was secret, it was not impossible to inquire.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian inquired about one.

The fourth personal disciple of the Primordial Ancestor, Qing Se was in control, she was an eight-realm level controller who had controlled the realm of will transformation, and she met Ye Tian's standards.

As for the other controllers who had mastered the Realm of Will Transformation Form, they were all at the level above the Nine Realms level controllers, and Ye Tian couldn't copy their bodies.

"Woman, it's a little embarrassing!"

Ye Tian frowned.

He hasn't copied a woman's body yet, but in order to break through, let's copy it.

Qing Se's controller is an eight-realm level master, so Ye Tian will not spy on her past time and space, and will be perceived by her.

So, Ye Tian came directly to the Phoenix Giant City where the Qing Se controller was located, she was born here, so she usually practiced penance here.

this day.

Ye Tian came to Phoenix Giant City and visited the Qingse controller by the way.

The Qingse controller didn't know Ye Tian's purpose, she thought that Ye Tian really came to visit her, but she didn't know that Ye Tian was there to spy on her body.

If she knew, she would have the idea of killing Ye Tian.

"Infinite Master, please be seated!"

The Qing Se controller greeted Ye Tian very politely and invited Ye Tian to be a guest in his mansion.

At this time, the Qing Se controller was also a little surprised.

She had heard of Ye Tian, but she didn't expect Ye Tian's cultivation speed to be so fast, and now he was already a master of the Eight Realms.

Moreover, she felt the breath of a primordial-level control body from Ye Tian's body.

"Qing Se master, I'm here to pay a special visit and ask for advice. "

Ye Tian said slightly.

Immediately, he said that he wanted to ask for advice on how to make the will break through to the Transfiguration Realm.

Qing Se Controller had mastered the Will Transformation Realm at the Eight Realms Level Controller level, so he was very proud, and he also thought that Ye Tian had really come to ask for advice, because her reputation in the Willification Transformation Realm was really great.

Soon, the Qingser Controller shared many of his experiences, but in fact it was of little help.

Ye Tian stayed here for a lot of time before leaving.

In this way, he would not arouse the suspicion of the Qingse's controllers.

After returning, Ye Tian re-copied the body of Qing Se's controller in the Void Region.

Time passed slowly, and the body of the Qing Se controller was completely condensed.

If other Eternal Masters were to come here, they would definitely think that this was the true Ruler of the Eternal Commanders.

Wanyuan Mountain.

The Ten Elements Ancestor sensed Ye Tian's behavior for the first time, and couldn't help but smile: "My disciple is really bold, if the old guy of the Primordial Ancestor knows about it, I'm afraid I will have to beat him up." "

Immediately, the Ten Elements Ancestor shielded the traces of time and space, and even the Primordial Ancestor could not perceive the situation in the Void Region at this moment.
